nodes.text: You... you cleared the bandits? Thank the gods. I've been trapped here for days.

choices.text: Are you alright? Can you walk?

nodes.text: I'll manage. Head to Greybridge — warn the garrison. The bandit camp has more men than we thought.
Ambushed on patrol. They came from the east. There's a full camp beyond the ridge. Greybridge needs to know.
